summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.parsers.structured; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import org.json.JSONException; import org.json.JSONObject; public class JsonRepairEngine { public String repair(String text) { if (text == null || text.trim().isEmpty()) return text; String repaired = text.trim(); repaired = removeMarkdown(repaired); repaired = normalizeCodeFences(repaired); repaired = stripNoise(repaired); repaired = extractPotentialJson(repaired); repaired = repairStructure(repaired); return repaired; } private String removeMarkdown(String text) { if (text.contains("```")) { int firstMatch = text.indexOf("```"); int lastMatch = text.lastIndexOf("```");
